combinations.id_prompt: A cinematic, hyper-realistic story of a young explorer discovering a hidden world.
frame_prompt_list: waking up in a small wooden cabin at dawn
looking out the window at a misty forest
packing a worn leather backpack
stepping onto a quiet forest trail
sunlight filtering through tall trees
discovering strange glowing footprints on the ground
following the footprints deeper into the woods
arriving at an ancient stone archway covered in vines
hesitating before stepping through the arch
entering a hidden world filled with floating lights
walking through a field of bioluminescent plants
encountering a small, curious glowing creature
reaching out to touch the creature
the creature guiding the explorer forward
crossing a narrow bridge over a glowing river
looking down at fish made of light swimming below
arriving at a towering crystal structure
entering the crystal structure's grand hall
walls reflecting countless shimmering colors
seeing ancient symbols carved into the floor
touching the symbols and activating them
a vision appearing of an ancient civilization
watching the rise of the hidden world
seeing its sudden mysterious collapse
the vision fading away slowly
realizing the responsibility to protect this world
the glowing creature reacting with urgency
the ground beginning to tremble
cracks forming in the crystal walls
running out of the structure as it collapses
escaping across the bridge as it breaks apart
reaching the glowing field again in chaos
the hidden world starting to fade
rushing back toward the stone archway
jumping through just as the world collapses
falling onto the forest ground back in reality
the forest now silent and normal again
checking the backpack and finding a glowing artifact
holding the artifact as it pulses with light
walking back toward the cabin at sunset
turning back for one last look at the forest
a faint glow appearing deep within the trees
smiling, knowing the hidden world still exists
